recipe.title: American pancakes
recipe.description: Make an epic pancake stack with this American pancake recipe. Thick and fluffy pancakes with syrup is such a winning combination for an epic brunch!

steps.descr: First separate the eggs, putting the whites into one...
steps.instructions: First separate the eggs, putting the whites into one bowl and the yolks into another.

on_enter.say: First separate the eggs, putting the whites into one bowl and the yolks into another.

steps.descr: Add the flour, baking powder and milk to the yolks and...
steps.instructions: Add the flour, baking powder and milk to the yolks and mix to a smooth thick batter.

on_enter.say: Add the flour, baking powder and milk to the yolks and mix to a smooth thick batter.

steps.descr: Whisk the whites with 1 pinch of sea salt until they...
steps.instructions: Whisk the whites with 1 pinch of sea salt until they form stiff peaks, then fold into the batter – it is now ready to use.

on_enter.say: Whisk the whites with 1 pinch of sea salt until they form stiff peaks, then fold into the batter – it is now ready to use.

steps.descr: Heat a non-stick pan over a medium heat, pour some of...
steps.instructions: Heat a non-stick pan over a medium heat, pour some of the batter into the pan and cook for a couple of minutes, or until it starts to look golden and firm.

on_enter.say: Heat a non-stick pan over a medium heat, pour some of the batter into the pan and cook for a couple of minutes, or until it starts to look golden and firm.

steps.descr: At this point sprinkle your chosen flavouring (see...
steps.instructions: At this point sprinkle your chosen flavouring (see below) onto the uncooked side before loosening with a spatula and flipping the pancake over. Continue frying until both sides are golden.

on_enter.say: At this point sprinkle your chosen flavouring (see below) onto the uncooked side before loosening with a spatula and flipping the pancake over. Continue frying until both sides are golden.

steps.descr: You can make these pancakes large or small, depending on...
steps.instructions: You can make these pancakes large or small, depending on what you prefer. Serve them with a drizzle of maple syrup, or even with some butter or crème fraîche. If you choose to sprinkle with a flavouring, try one of these... Fresh corn from the cob, crispy bacon or pancetta, blueberries, banana, stewed apple, grated chocolate – anything else you can imagine...

on_enter.say: You can make these pancakes large or small, depending on what you prefer. Serve them with a drizzle of maple syrup, or even with some butter or crème fraîche. If you choose to sprinkle with a flavouring, try one of these... Fresh corn from the cob, crispy bacon or pancetta, blueberries, banana, stewed apple, grated chocolate – anything else you can imagine...
